leadText: Pokémon Festa (Japanese: ポケモンフェスタ Pokémon Festa) was an annual convention held throughout various locations in Japan. It was sanctioned by Nintendo and featured events, games, shopping, and previews of upcoming games and movies.

sections.title: Pokémon Festa 2002
sections.text: Pokémon Festa 2002 [ edit | edit source ] The 2002 event gave further information about the games Pokémon Ruby and Sapphire . Those who came to the event were given the opportunity of playing through a demo of the games . The features of this demo were limited however, for example the Flower Shop was always closed.

sections.title: Pokémon Festa 2003
sections.text: Pokémon Festa 2003 [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Festa 2003 featured a distribution of the Negaiboshi Jirachi .
